title: oreocarya suffruticosa var. pustulosa
intro: Oreocarya suffruticosa var. pustulosa, also known as a variety of the Oreocarya suffruticosa plant, is a type of flowering plant in the borage family. It has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Oreocarya suffruticosa var. pustulosa can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized for various health benefits.
